steps.title: Find the restatement
steps.content: The first sentence says the researchers determined the ratio of three plant subtypes in elk diets. The second clause says they determined the relative quantities of the plants consumed. Those ideas match: "relative quantities" clarifies what "ratio" means here.

steps.title: Choose a clarifying transition
steps.content: B would add a separate point, but the second clause restates the first. C would set up a contrast, and D would suggest a sequence of steps; neither relationship appears. The blank needs a phrase that introduces clarification or rephrasing. The answer is A.
